null_recomputation_policy: Preserve timestamps, contracts and signed aggressor-flow fields, hence the frozen outcome-free signal paths. Recompute price-derived fields in every null world before identical account episodes.
promotion_policy: ARTEFACT_GEOMETRY_ONLY tombstones the exact mechanism class before candidate power, null, DSR/BH, Combine, or shadow work. GREEN_NULL_ADJUSTED_BASELINE permits power audit only for frozen walk-forward-positive candidates.
CONTRE: The price-null worlds preserve the observed aggressive-flow sequence, so they isolate price-path geometry but cannot test whether that flow sequence itself was selected by an unobserved regime; a green result remains development evidence.
